metadata.description: Glossary and standardized vocabulary for KG-based auditing of LSTM streamflow predictions
metadata.notes: This glossary defines entities, attributes, and predicates prior to RDF instantiation.

Catchment.description: A hydrologic drainage basin used as a spatial aggregation unit.

Reach.description: A river network segment with static physical attributes and topology.

TimeStep.description: A discrete temporal index used to relate dynamic observations and predictions.

Observation.description: Measured hydrologic, meteorologic, or land-surface variables.

Forcing.description: Externally imposed drivers such as precipitation or temperature.

State.description: Internal system states such as soil moisture.

StaticAttribute.description: Time-invariant physical characteristics of reaches or catchments.

flowsTo.definition: Defines downstream topological connectivity between river reaches.

containsReach.definition: Associates a catchment with the river reaches physically located within it.
containsReach.audit_role: Spatial containment of river network elements

forCatchment.definition: Associates an observation or prediction with a specific catchment.
forCatchment.audit_role: Spatial alignment of dynamic hydrologic variables

hasGeometry.definition: Spatial geometry of the river reach.

hasReachLength.definition: Total length of the river reach.

hasSlope.definition: Average bed slope of the reach.

hasFlowType.definition: Categorical description of flow regime or channel type.

hasAirTemperature.definition: Mean 2-meter air temperature over a timestep.

hasPotentialEvaporation.definition: Potential evaporation summed over a timestep.

hasSolarRadiation.definition: Surface net solar radiation averaged over the timestep.

hasSoilMoistureL1.definition: Mean volumetric soil water content, layer 1.

hasSoilMoistureL2.definition: Mean volumetric soil water content, layer 2.

hasSoilMoistureL3.definition: Mean volumetric soil water content, layer 3.

hasDischarge.definition: Volumetric streamflow rate at a catchment outlet.
hasDischarge.audit_role: Primary variable audited for all hydrologic constraints

hasMaxCapacity.definition: Estimated maximum conveyance capacity of the reach.

hasTimeStep.definition: Associates a value with a specific timestep.
